zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Thomas Woodcock於1519年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦布倫登時，他的父親Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight31歲，母親Isabel Keurden30歲。他於大約1547年與Helen Collier在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1586年9月1日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Thomas Woodcock于1519年出生在英国英格兰倫敦布倫登时，他的父亲Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight31岁，母亲Isabel Keurden30岁。他于大约1547年与Helen Collier在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1586年9月1日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Woodcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English wodecok ‘woodcock’ (Old English wuducocc, a compound of Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cocc ‘cock, bird’), a type of bird that is notoriously easy to catch. Therefore, the name might have been either for a person who caught or sold woodcock, or a nickname for a gullible person.

in some cases, because there can be confusion between -cock and -cot in surnames, and therefore the name may also be a variant of Woodcott, a habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cot ‘cottage, shelter’, such as Woodcott in Cheshire and Hampshire or Woodcote in Hampshire, Surrey, Oxfordshire, Warwickshire, and Shropshire, or from any residence at a cottage in or near a wood.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Thomas Woodcock was born in 1519, in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight, was 31 and his mother, Isabel Keurden, was 30. He married Helen Collier about 1547, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 September 1586, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Thomas Woodcock est né en 1519, à Blendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel Keurden, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Helen Collier environ 1547, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1586, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Thomas Woodcock 1519 in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight 31 und seine Mutter Isabel Keurden 30. Er hat um 1547 in London, England Helen Collier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1586 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Thomas Woodcock è nato il nel 1519 nel Blendon, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Keurden, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Helen Collier circa 1547, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1586, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Thomas Woodcockが1519年にイギリスイギリスロンドンブレンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knightは31歳，母Isabel Keurdenは30歳であった。約1547年にイギリスロンドンでHelen Collierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1586年9月1日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Thomas Woodcock(이)가 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블렌던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Keurden(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1547년 영국 런던에서 Helen Collier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1586년 9월 1일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Thomas Woodcock nasceu em 1519, em Blendon, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Keurden, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Collier aproximadamente 1547, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1586, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Thomas Woodcock родился в 1519 г. в местности блендон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Keurden, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Collier около 1547 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 сентября 1586 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Thomas Woodcock nació en 1519, en Blendon, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Joseph William Woodcock, Knight, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel Keurden, tenía 30 años.
